riskFactors: Current mUSDC market, TVL, APY, holder, and liquidity metrics need fresh verification after correcting the asset identity.
Maple USDC Pool is a credit product, so borrower default and pool delegate underwriting risk are central risk drivers.
Pool withdrawals are subject to available liquidity and borrower repayment/maturity profile rather than guaranteed instant redemption.
No public legal opinion URL, proof-of-reserves oracle, independent reserve audit, or verified reserveBreakdown is currently mapped for the corrected mUSDC asset.
Regulatory treatment is pool- and jurisdiction-dependent and should remain conservative until current legal documents are mapped.
The previous MPLcashUSDC Treasury/repo data was removed because it belongs to Maple Cash Management Pool, not Maple USDC Pool.
mitigants: Maple is an established institutional credit protocol with pool-level on-chain accounting and borrower/pool-delegate workflow.
Legacy seed data indicates Ethereum contract verification for the mUSDC token address.
Institutional onboarding and KYC/AML controls are expected for Maple institutional pools, pending fresh source verification.
USDC-denominated pool structure provides clear redemption asset denomination, subject to pool liquidity.
